title: Boat Rental in Vigo: A Practical Guide to Choosing Your Charter
html:
When you rent a boat in Vigo, you step into the heart of the Rías Baixas, where the Atlantic meets the Cíes Islands. Prices for a half-day motorboat start around €200, and you can find a skippered charter on BoatHire24 to suit your group and budget.

Where to set off in Vigo

The main departure point is the Real Club Náutico de Vigo, a full-service marina in the city centre. From there you can reach the Cíes Islands in under an hour. Other bases include the port of Cangas across the Ría de Vigo, the marina at Sanxenxo for the southern coast, and Baiona with its historic Parador. The sheltered bay of Ensenada de San Simón is a quieter alternative for those who prefer calm waters. Each spot gives you direct access to the Rías Baixas archipelago, with its white beaches and clear Atlantic water. You can find a skippered charter in a few minutes.

Which boat to rent

  1. Motorboat, Best for quick trips to the nearest beaches, carries up to 6 guests, from €180 for a half-day.
  2. Sailboat, Ideal for a relaxing day on the Ría de Vigo, can take up to 8 people, from €300 for a full day.
  3. Catamaran, Spacious and stable, perfect for larger groups or families with children, up to 12 guests, from €500 for a full day.
  4. Luxury yacht, For a premium experience, models like Azimut or Fairline are available, up to 10 guests, from €1,200 for a full day.
  5. RIB, A rigid inflatable boat for speed and agility, often used for water sports, up to 8 guests, from €250 half-day.

For a practical example, consider this speedboat, the Olympic 490, which is a popular choice for small groups wanting to explore the coves near the Cíes Islands. It handles the Atlantic swell well and is easy to moor in shallow anchorages. One option worth a look is this speedboat.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Vigo?

A boat rental in Vigo typically ranges from €180 for a half-day motorboat to over €1,500 for a crewed luxury yacht. Shared tours of the Cíes Islands start at around €50 per person. A small motorboat for a private half-day with up to 6 guests is about €180. A catamaran for a full day with skipper costs from €500. A crewed yacht with professional captain and crew for a full day starts at €1,200. Prices vary by season and vessel size, but booking through BoatHire24 gives you transparent pricing and verified listings. You can also see more at browse the listings.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Vigo?

In Spain, a recreational boating licence is required for any boat over 5 metres or with more than 15 horsepower, but many rentals include a skipper. Your operator will confirm the exact requirements for your chosen vessel. BoatHire24 listings clearly state whether a licence is needed or if a licensed skipper is included.

For a memorable day on the water, time your trip around the morning breeze from the north-east, which picks up around 10am and makes for ideal sailing in the Ría de Vigo. The high season runs from June to September, when the weather is warmest and the sea is calmest.

At a glance

  • Price band: €50 to €1,500+ per day
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: half-day (4h) or full-day (8h)
  • Capacity: 1 to 12 guests
  • Currency: Euro (EUR)

Questions about boat rental in Vigo

Can I rent a boat in Vigo without a licence?

Yes, you can rent a boat without a licence if you choose a vessel that comes with a qualified skipper, which is common for motorboats and yachts.

What is the best time of year to rent a boat in Vigo?

The best time is between June and September when the weather is warm and the sea conditions are most favourable for exploring the Rías Baixas.

How long does it take to reach the Cíes Islands from Vigo?

The crossing from Vigo port to the Cíes Islands takes about 40 to 60 minutes by motorboat, depending on sea conditions.

Are there guided tours available for the Cíes Islands?

Yes, many operators offer guided tours that include stops for swimming and sightseeing, and you can book these through the same rental platforms.

Whether you are a first-time visitor or a seasoned boater, renting a boat in Vigo opens up the stunning coast of the Rías Baixas. To see what is available for your dates, browse the listings on BoatHire24, a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Vigo or list your own.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Vigo and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
